# Anass Ez-zouaine — Senior Backend Engineer · Software Architect · AI Engineer

> Personal site, portfolio, and engineering blog of Anass Ez-zouaine. 12+ years
> shipping production Laravel SaaS, Shopify Plus apps, and AI features (Anthropic
> Claude, MCP, RAG, agentic systems). Remote-first since 2014, based in Meknes,
> Morocco. Available for senior / lead / fractional CTO and advisory engagements.

## About

- [About](https://ansezz.com/about/): Background, experience, and how I work.
- [Work](https://ansezz.com/work/): Selected projects — AI engineering, Shopify Plus apps, multi-tenant SaaS, open source.
- [Services](https://ansezz.com/services/): Engagements — MVP build, AI integration sprint, Shopify Plus app, architecture audit.
- [Now](https://ansezz.com/now/): What I'm focused on right now.
- [Uses](https://ansezz.com/uses/): Tools, stack, and hardware I use daily.
- [Contact](https://ansezz.com/contact/): Email, phone, booking, and socials.

## Blog

Topics: Laravel internals & Octane, AI engineering with Claude + MCP, RAG
pipelines on pgvector, Shopify Plus, DevOps & self-hosting (Coolify), and
software architecture.

- [Blog index](https://ansezz.com/blog/): All posts.
- [AI posts](https://ansezz.com/blog/category/ai/)
- [Laravel posts](https://ansezz.com/blog/category/laravel/)
- [Shopify posts](https://ansezz.com/blog/category/shopify/)
- [Architecture posts](https://ansezz.com/blog/category/architecture/)
